TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Maledep ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Kingbong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 94 buwan, 242 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 99% kyan ku 239 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 1% kyan ku 3 hi nya. rhzyal kki'an lingay na Maledep ga Kaaluan ru Tjuletevetevek. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Maledep ga ungat kyokay. hasisyo qalang Maledep ga maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Maledep ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč male*ep …£a nija mki s~…ēku tajto keŇč atu kiŇčő≤oŇč …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a ** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *% kjan ku * ńßi nja. rńßzjal kki Ēan liŇčaj na male*ep …£a kaaluan ru tjulete*ete*ek. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj qalaŇč male*ep …£a uŇčat kjokaj. ńßas~…ēis~…ējo qalaŇč male*ep …£a maki * ńßas~…ēis~…ējo. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan qalaŇč male*ep …£a uŇčat pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru. tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
S.FORM: alang Maledep ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Kingbong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 94 buwan, 242 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 99% kyan ku 239 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 1% kyan ku 3 hi nya. rhzyal kki'an lingay na Maledep ga Kaaluan ru Tjuletevetevek. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Maledep ga ungat kyokay. hasisyo qalang Maledep ga maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Maledep ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
